steps.title: Define the smaller integer
steps.content:
Let $n$ be the smaller positive integer. The other integer is $7$ greater than twice it, so it is
$$2n+7$$

steps.title: Use the positive solution
steps.content:
Set each factor equal to $0$.
$$2n+31=0 \quad \text{or} \quad n-12=0$$
The positive value is $n=12$.
The answer is 12.
